name: Egg Beaters Benedict
recipeIngredient: 1 packet dry Butter Buds Mix, not diluted
recipeInstructions:
Prepare Hollandaise Sauce: Combine the Butter Buds packet, dry milk, and 2 tablespoons hot water. In a separate bowl, beat the egg white until foamy. Mix together the salt, mustard, and vinegar. Slowly blend in the liquid Butter Buds and the contents of the first bowl while beating. Stir in 4 tablespoons hot water and lemon juice.
Poach Egg Beaters: Fill a poacher with water to just below the bottom of the egg cups; heat until boiling. Spray the metal egg cups with cooking spray. Pour 1/4 carton of Egg Beaters into each cup. Place the egg cups in the frame over the boiling water, cover, and steam for 3-5 minutes or until desired doneness.
Cover each English muffin half with a turkey slice; top with poached Egg Beater. Spoon 2-3 tablespoons Hollandaise sauce over each Egg Beater. Garnish with parsley flakes.
